message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-desktop-1633-podman-desktop-hangs-at-initializing-podman-on-mac-book-m1",
+  "missionClass": "solution",

+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-desktop: Podman Desktop Hangs at \"Initializing Podman\" on Mac Book M1",
+    "description": "Podman Desktop Hangs at \"Initializing Podman\" on Mac Book M1. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current podman-desktop deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your podman-desktop version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nhelm list -n podman-desktop 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working podman-desktop installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-desktop configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant podman-desktop configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nkubectl get configmap -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=podman-desktop\n```\n### Bug description\n\nPodman Desktop stuck in above state after install.\n\n### Operating system\n\nmacOS Ventura 13..2.1\n\n### Version\n\n0.12.0\n\n### Steps to reproduce\n\nInstall Podman Desktop on a blank system."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Podman Desktop Hangs at \"Initializing Podman\" on Mac Book M1",
+        "description": "### What does this PR do?\n\nIf the current cluster context defined in the user's kube config is not accessible, the startup of Podman Desktop can take 1-2 minutes. This PR fixes the slow initialisation issue mentioned by me in #1633. \n\nThis PR may not be the optimal fix, but I am opening it in case\n```yaml\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ Kubeconfig path /Users/tom/.kube/config provided does not exist. Skipping.\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ PluginSystem: received dom-ready event from the UI\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ Delayed startup, flushing 6 events\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ System ready. Loading extensions...\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ Activating extension (compose)\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ Activation extension (compose) ended\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ Activating extension (docker)\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ Activation extension (docker) ended\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ Activating extension (kind)\nindex.ts:1327 main ↪️ Activating extension \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop\nkubectl get events -n podman-desktop --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Podman Desktop Hangs at \"Initializing Podman\" on Mac Book M1\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What does this PR do?\n\nIf the current cluster context defined in the user's kube config is not accessible, the startup of Podman Desktop can take 1-2 minutes. This PR fixes the slow initialisation issue mentioned by me in #1633. \n\nThis PR may not be the optimal fix, but I am opening it in case it is considered a valid temporary workaround.",
